## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo check` passes with no errors or new warnings
- [ ] `cargo test` (and `cargo test --all-features`) passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings` is clean
- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check` is clean
- [ ] Public items are documented; `cargo doc --all-features` builds
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md`
- [ ] Bumped the version in `Cargo.toml` if applicable
- [ ] Added tests for new functionality
- [ ] No clean-room violation (no new AMQP-crate dependency or copied code)
